backlog.description: Improve stat-box visual design — needs more polish, better spacing, subtle background, shadow refinement
Add visual diversity — improve blockquote/callout styling for Key Takeaway sections
Mobile card layout needs spacing fixes — category pills overflow on small screens
H2 headings need stronger visual hierarchy — consider larger size or weight adjustment
Dark mode contrast audit — verify all components meet WCAG AA 4.5:1 ratio
Footer layout needs polish — improve spacing, link grouping, visual balance
Table of contents styling improvements — better indentation, active state, scroll behavior
Breadcrumb visual design — improve separator, spacing, and hover states
Newsletter subscription form styling — improve input field and button design
Cookie banner polish — improve visual integration with site design
Home hero section — improve engagement with better typography and CTA visibility
Category filter tab styling — improve active state indicator and spacing
Code block syntax highlighting and styling improvements
375px phone breakpoint audit — verify all components render properly on small screens
Page load performance — verify image lazy loading, optimize CSS delivery
Footer grid switches to 1-column on 768px, but gap reduces from 3rem to 2rem — consider more aggressive mobile footer restructuring (logo + RSS on top, then links grid below)
Category pill text can overflow on narrow mobile screens (320px+); consider adding flex-wrap or reducing max-width dynamically
H3 headings (1.2rem) could benefit from responsive scaling similar to H2; currently fixed size may appear cramped on mobile
Stat box border and shadow contrast needs verification in dark mode; border color uses --accent-blue which may not have sufficient contrast against dark backgrounds
Scan all published posts for picsum.photos placeholder images and flag them for manual replacement with real Pexels/Pixabay images
Verify recent posts have non-midnight timestamps (T00:00:00Z indicates broken formatter) and real cover images (not picsum.photos)
Verify stat-box tertiary background contrast against dark theme background (#0D1117); ensure --tertiary (#21262D) provides sufficient visual distinction
Footer section heading (h2) should precede footer columns; currently missing h2 wrapper before footer-links div, causing h2→h3 skip in accessibility tree
Footer grid layout may not stack properly on tablet (768px); footer-links may need flex-wrap adjustment for 2 column layout at smaller widths
Category pill in card header uses text-overflow: ellipsis but may not handle very long category names gracefully on mobile; consider max-width percentage or line-clamp
Hero stats strip in home info uses flex with separators; on very small screens (320px) may wrap awkwardly; test min-width constraints

completed.description: H2 headings in article body use 1.5rem (24px) — consider increasing to 1.75rem (28px) for better visual hierarchy and readability on desktop; mobile H2 should remain fluid
Card excerpts truncate at 3 lines (via -webkit-line-clamp: 3) — on 375px screens, this creates inconsistent card heights; consider 2-line clamp on mobile
Footer h4 headings should be h3 to fix h2→h3 progression; Navigate heading changed successfully to h3, but Legal heading still h4 due to template formatting quirk
